name: Lighter Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Mix sugars, butter, vanilla, and egg in a large bowl.
3. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt (dough will be stiff).
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until light brown (centers will be soft).
7. Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
